Question: List all products
Intent: Retrieve all product records
SQL_Query: SELECT * FROM products;

Question: Get all customers
Intent: Retrieve all customer records
SQL_Query: SELECT * FROM customers;

Question: Show all orders
Intent: Retrieve all order records
SQL_Query: SELECT * FROM orders;

Question: List all employees
Intent: Retrieve all employee records
SQL_Query: SELECT * FROM employees;

Question: Get all offices
Intent: Retrieve all office records
SQL_Query: SELECT * FROM offices;

Question: Show all product lines
Intent: Retrieve all product line records
SQL_Query: SELECT * FROM productlines;

Question: List all payments
Intent: Retrieve all payment records
SQL_Query: SELECT * FROM payments;

Question: Get product names and prices
Intent: Retrieve product names and pricing info
SQL_Query: SELECT productName, buyPrice, MSRP FROM products;

Question: Get customer names and cities
Intent: Retrieve customer names and their cities
SQL_Query: SELECT customerName, city FROM customers;

Question: List employee first and last names
Intent: Retrieve employee full names
SQL_Query: SELECT firstName, lastName FROM employees;

Question: Get all order dates
Intent: Retrieve order numbers and dates
SQL_Query: SELECT orderNumber, orderDate FROM orders;

Question: Show product vendor list
Intent: Retrieve distinct product vendors
SQL_Query: SELECT DISTINCT productVendor FROM products;

Question: Get all product codes
Intent: Retrieve all product codes
SQL_Query: SELECT productCode FROM products;

Question: List all countries from offices
Intent: Retrieve countries where offices are located
SQL_Query: SELECT DISTINCT country FROM offices;

Question: Show all order statuses
Intent: Retrieve distinct order statuses
SQL_Query: SELECT DISTINCT status FROM orders;

Question: Get all payment amounts
Intent: Retrieve payment check numbers and amounts
SQL_Query: SELECT checkNumber, amount FROM payments;

Question: List all job titles
Intent: Retrieve distinct employee job titles
SQL_Query: SELECT DISTINCT jobTitle FROM employees;

Question: Get customer phone numbers
Intent: Retrieve customer names and contact info
SQL_Query: SELECT customerName, phone FROM customers;

Question: Show product MSRP values
Intent: Retrieve product names and MSRP pricing
SQL_Query: SELECT productName, MSRP FROM products;

Question: List order numbers
Intent: Retrieve all order numbers
SQL_Query: SELECT orderNumber FROM orders;

Question: Get orders with customer names
Intent: Retrieve orders along with customer names
SQL_Query: SELECT o.orderNumber, c.customerName, o.orderDate, o.status FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customerNumber = c.customerNumber;

Question: Get employees with office city
Intent: Retrieve employees and their office location
SQL_Query: SELECT e.firstName, e.lastName, o.city FROM employees e JOIN offices o ON e.officeCode = o.officeCode;

Question: Get payments with customer names
Intent: Retrieve payments alongside customer info
SQL_Query: SELECT c.customerName, p.checkNumber, p.amount, p.paymentDate FROM payments p JOIN customers c ON p.customerNumber = c.customerNumber;

Question: Get order details with product names
Intent: Retrieve order line items with product names
SQL_Query: SELECT od.orderNumber, p.productName, od.quantityOrdered, od.priceEach FROM orderdetails od JOIN products p ON od.productCode = p.productCode;

Question: Get products with product line description
Intent: Retrieve products with their product line description
SQL_Query: SELECT p.productName, p.productLine, pl.textDescription FROM products p JOIN productlines pl ON p.productLine = pl.productLine;

Question: Get customers with sales rep names
Intent: Retrieve customers and their assigned sales rep
SQL_Query: SELECT c.customerName, e.firstName, e.lastName FROM customers c JOIN employees e ON c.salesRepEmployeeNumber = e.employeeNumber;

Question: Get orders with customer city
Intent: Retrieve orders along with customer city
SQL_Query: SELECT o.orderNumber, o.orderDate, c.customerName, c.city FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o.customerNumber = c.customerNumber;

Question: Get employees and their manager
Intent: Retrieve employees along with their manager name
Columns: e.firstName, e.lastName, m.firstName AS managerFirstName, m.lastName AS managerLastName
SQL_Query: SELECT e.firstName, e.lastName, m.firstName AS managerFirstName, m.lastName AS managerLastName FROM employees e LEFT JOIN employees m ON e.reportsTo = m.employeeNumber;

Question: Get orderdetails with product vendor
Intent: Retrieve order details with product vendor info
SQL_Query: SELECT od.orderNumber, p.productName, p.productVendor, od.quantityOrdered FROM orderdetails od JOIN products p ON od.productCode = p.productCode;

Question: Get payments with customer country
Intent: Retrieve payments with customer country info
SQL_Query: SELECT c.customerName, c.country, p.amount, p.paymentDate FROM payments p JOIN customers c ON p.customerNumber = c.customerNumber;

Question: Count customers per country
Intent: Count the number of customers in each country
SQL_Query: SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS customerCount FROM customers GROUP BY country;

Question: Total payments per customer
Intent: Sum of payments for each customer
SQL_Query: SELECT customerNumber, SUM(amount) AS totalPayments FROM payments GROUP BY customerNumber;

Question: Number of orders per status
Intent: Count orders grouped by their status
SQL_Query: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS orderCount FROM orders GROUP BY status;

Question: Products per product line
Intent: Count products in each product line
SQL_Query: SELECT productLine, COUNT(*) AS productCount FROM products GROUP BY productLine;

Question: Employees per office
Intent: Count employees in each office
SQL_Query: SELECT officeCode, COUNT(*) AS employeeCount FROM employees GROUP BY officeCode;

Question: Total stock per product vendor
Intent: Sum of quantity in stock per vendor
SQL_Query: SELECT productVendor, SUM(quantityInStock) AS totalStock FROM products GROUP BY productVendor;

Question: Average buy price per product line
Intent: Calculate average buy price for each product line
SQL_Query: SELECT productLine, AVG(buyPrice) AS avgBuyPrice FROM products GROUP BY productLine;

Question: Orders per customer
Intent: Count number of orders placed by each customer
SQL_Query: SELECT customerNumber, COUNT(*) AS orderCount FROM orders GROUP BY customerNumber;

Question: Max MSRP per product line
Intent: Find the highest MSRP in each product line
SQL_Query: SELECT productLine, MAX(MSRP) AS maxMSRP FROM products GROUP BY productLine;

Question: Min buy price per vendor
Intent: Find the lowest buy price for each vendor
SQL_Query: SELECT productVendor, MIN(buyPrice) AS minBuyPrice FROM products GROUP BY productVendor;

Question: Total number of customers
Intent: Count total number of customers
SQL_Query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCustomers FROM customers;

Question: Total number of products
Intent: Count total number of products
SQL_Query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalProducts FROM products;

Question: Total revenue from payments
Intent: Sum all payment amounts for total revenue
SQL_Query: SELECT SUM(amount) AS totalRevenue FROM payments;

Question: Average product price
Intent: Calculate average buy price across all products
SQL_Query: SELECT AVG(buyPrice) AS avgPrice FROM products;

Question: Max payment amount
Intent: Find the highest single payment amount
SQL_Query: SELECT MAX(amount) AS maxPayment FROM payments;

Question: Min payment amount
Intent: Find the lowest single payment amount
SQL_Query: SELECT MIN(amount) AS minPayment FROM payments;

Question: Count total orders
Intent: Count total number of orders
SQL_Query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalOrders FROM orders;

Question: Total quantity in stock
Intent: Sum all product quantities in stock
SQL_Query: SELECT SUM(quantityInStock) AS totalStock FROM products;

Question: Average MSRP
Intent: Calculate average MSRP across all products
SQL_Query: SELECT AVG(MSRP) AS avgMSRP FROM products;

Question: Number of employees
Intent: Count total number of employees
SQL_Query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalEmployees FROM employees;
